description: Canonical member catalog for the governed Cube model (semantic/model/cubes/*.js). One entry per queryable member in Cube.member form. Hidden members (shown: false, e.g. *.tenant_id) are NOT listed: a view-spec must never reference them. tests/unit/test_semantic_catalog.py asserts this file never drifts from the .js cube definitions; shared/semantic_catalog.py is the loader consumers (view-spec member validation) read.
